description: Calibration set 8, 2026-07-03 23:12-23:19 (WOS_BattleReports_FarSeerCalibration_v8.pdf). Far Seer vs Lv13 Tapir, 1000 T7 infantry throughout, lethality panel +20% (President buff). Debuff + stacking experiments. New hero cards documented: Ling Xue (lancer slot, +17.7 Atk/Def), Elif (INFANTRY slot, HUGE card +457.3 Atk/Def -> Inf rows 469.4/467.4), Estrella (lancer slot, +404.1 -> 416.2/414.2), Ligeia (marksman slot, +200.1 -> 212.2/210.2).

tooltips_verbatim.Ling Xue S1 Fearsome Aura L1: reducing all enemy Troops' Attack by 4%
tooltips_verbatim.Elif S1 Shackling Veil L1: reducing all enemy Troops' Attack by 5%
tooltips_verbatim.Elif S2 Slash Formation L1: increasing Troops' Attack by 3% and Troops' Defense by 2%
tooltips_verbatim.Estrella S1 Corrosive Color L1: reducing the Defense of all enemy troops by 5%
tooltips_verbatim.Estrella S2 Dawn Canvas L1: increasing the Attack of all allied troops by 3% and their Defense by 2%
tooltips_verbatim.Ligeia S1 Nerf Poison L1: reducing all enemy Defense by 5% (NOTE: tooltip says DEFENSE, not lethality as expected)

battles.note: BLIND PREDICTION PASSED (adjusted to her actual L1 -4%): predicted T~59.9 -> 14 procs (obs 14); kills predicted 244 (obs 242). Enemy-ATTACK debuff = multiplicative on beast attack, slows incoming, extends battle.

First T7-1000 VICTORY vs Tapir - Elif's giant infantry card (Atk x5.08, Def x4.66 on the actual troops) + stacked attack debuffs (-4%, -5%). Great engine regression battle; too many simultaneous effects for isolation.
Enemy-DEFENSE debuff check: 177 x 1.0997(leth) x 1.0526(wall D /0.95) x 1.03(S2 atk) x ~1.01(S2 def duration) = 213 vs obs 214. Wall defense divides ~linearly.

SAME-STAT DEBUFF STACKING: second -5% enemy-defense added: 224/214 = x1.0467 vs additive-pool prediction x1.0556 and multiplicative x1.0526. Stacks fully (no cliff), but additive-vs-multiplicative separation is BELOW integer resolution at 5% magnitudes - needs L5-scale debuffs to separate (second-order for the engine).

key_findings: Enemy-ATTACK debuffs: multiplicative on the enemy stat, verified via duration clock (blind prediction passed).
Enemy-DEFENSE debuffs: divide the wall's defense ~linearly in our kill output (214 check exact within rounding).
Same-stat debuff stacking: two sources stack ~fully; additive-pool vs multiplicative indistinguishable at 4-5% levels.
Elif = infantry hero with a very large card - her presence QUINTUPLES a weak farm's infantry panel; caused first T7 victory vs Tapir.
Ligeia S1 tooltip contradicts expectation (defense, not lethality) - trust tooltips over hearsay.
